description_long: This is a red, industrial-style hand trolley constructed primarily from metal, featuring a rectangular flat platform at the base for loading items. The trolley has a tall, upright frame with two horizontal support bars and a single, continuous handlebar at the top for easy gripping and maneuvering. Two large, solid black wheels are mounted on either side of the lower frame, providing stability and smooth rolling over urban surfaces. The platform shows signs of wear and scuff marks, indicating frequent use in transporting heavy or bulky objects. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed metal joints and a slightly weathered finish, suitable for use in warehouses, garages, or on city sidewalks. No visible branding or signage is present on the frame or platform.
description: A red metal hand trolley with a flat loading platform, tall handlebar, and two large black wheels, showing signs of wear and heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat loading platform, upright frame, and both wheels symmetrically positioned.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the platform, the wheel's thickness, and the vertical frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the platform, the two wheels, and the handlebar's full width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1 but from the other side, with clear visibility of the wheel and frame connection.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, straight, made of metal, integrated with the frame, no ergonomic padding or folding features
attribute_wheel_arrangement: two parallel wheels mounted at the rear base
